data.description: In Montreal on April 16, 2026, AHOY, a deep-tech infrastructure firm creating the operational foundation for Real-World AI, revealed that it has exceeded $100 million in annual recurring revenue. data.title: VTEX Puts AI at the Core of Ecommerce, Announcing a New Era of Digital Commerce
data.description: In a recent announcement, VTEX (NYSE: VTEX) unveiled a significant technological advancement by incorporating AI at the heart of its architecture. This evolution was introduced at VTEX Day as part of VTEX Vision 2026, showcasing the company's transition to an AI-native commerce suite. The update aims to streamline operations, enhance customer experiences through personalization, and boost ad monetization. For more information on the latest product releases under VTEX Vision 2026, visit the provided link. The shift towards leveraging AI signifies a strategic move to enhance the capabilities of VTEX's digital commerce solutions.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Zūm/
data.description: Zum has secured a significant investment of $100 million from TPG to enhance Zum's Connected Mobility Experience (CMX) and support its ongoing development and expansion. The funding boost signifies a major milestone for Zum and underscores the company's commitment to revolutionizing the mobility industry.

data.title: Immersive National Baseball Day Watch Party Set for Batbox Dallas
data.description: On April 16, 2026 in Dallas, Batbox Dallas, a sports bar and restaurant, is introducing a National Baseball Day watch party to cater to the increasing number of fans seeking interactive experiences outside of their homes. The event will feature baseball simulators and strives to provide a communal setting for live sports enjoyment.

data.title: APPLIED Adhesives Named a 3M Preferred Adhesive Distributor
data.description: A company based in Minnetonka, Minnesota, APPLIED Adhesives, disclosed on April 16, 2026, that it has successfully secured a spot in the 3M Preferred Adhesive Distributor (PAD) Program. This achievement signifies a notable advancement for the company as it highlights their dedication to providing high-quality adhesive solutions.

data.title: Genius Group Announces Closing of $8,000,000 Registered Direct Offering
data.description: Genius Group Limited (NYSE American: GNS), a prominent AI-driven education group based in Singapore, revealed the successful completion of its registered direct offering. The offering involved 21,621,621 ordinary shares (or pre-funded warrants) priced at $0.37 per share. This generated a total of $8,000,000 in gross proceeds for the Company, excluding placement agent fees and additional expenses.

data.title: Volato Group Announces April 17 Record Date and May 7 Special Meeting Date for Shareholder Vote on Proposed Merger With M2i Global
data.description: Atlanta-based Volato Group, Inc. (NYSE American: SOAR) is set to convene a special shareholder meeting on May 7, 2026, to vote on the planned merger with M2i Global, Inc. The merger aims to bring these two entities together. Shareholders on record by April 17, 2026, will have the voting rights at the meeting. The Company anticipates closing the merger soon after the meeting, pending shareholder agreement and meeting the specified conditions.

data.title: 2026 Hyundai Elantra N TCR Edition Offers Compelling Pricing
data.description: The special TCR Edition of the Hyundai Elantra is priced at $39,250 with a manual gearbox and $40,750 with a dual-clutch transmission (DCT). This model is a celebration of Hyundai's six-consecutive TCR Manufacturers' Championships in the IMSA Michelin Pilot Challenge series. The Elantra N TCR Edition offers unique features and commemorates the successful streak in the racing world.
